title: Cod Tacos with Griddled Onions
description: A twist on traditional tacos, this dish features cod cooked to perfection and served in a crispy taco shell with caramelized onions.

ingredients.name: Griddled Onions
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced, sautéed in a pan

instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Season the cod with taco seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Add a tablespoon of avocado oil to the pan and sear the cod for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the cod to a plate and set aside.
Add another tablespoon of avocado oil to the pan and sauté the sliced onions until caramelized.
Warm the taco shells according to package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by placing a piece of cod onto each shell, followed by a spoonful of grilled onions.
Squeeze a sliver of lime juice over each taco and garnish with chopped cilantro.
